title: drosanthe scabra
intro: Drosanthe scabra, also known as rough drosanthe, is a flowering plant species within the family Boraginaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Drosanthe scabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
